howItWorks.intro: This iranian rial collapse calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Salary in USD = salary in rial / black market rate
Purchasing power loss = (current rate - pre-sanctions rate) / current rate × 100
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: Why are there two exchange rates?
faq.answer: Iran maintains an official government rate (used for essential imports) and a free market rate that reflects actual currency demand. The gap between them has widened dramatically under sanctions, with the black market rate sometimes 10x the official rate.

faq.question: Is the Iranian Rial Collapse Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What sanctions severity should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate sanctions severity value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Iranian Rial Collapse Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Iranian Rial Collapse Calculator?
sections.body: The Iranian Rial Collapse Calculator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your sanctions severity, monthly salary, you get instant results including official rate, black market rate, salary in usd. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting official rate right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your sanctions severity and need to find the right official rate. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Sanctions Severity
howToSteps.description: Type or select your sanctions severity in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Monthly Salary (million rial)
howToSteps.description: Type or select your monthly salary in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your official rate, black market rate, salary in usd. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your sanctions severity before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both official rate and black market rate — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to understand global dynamics.
If you're unsure about your monthly salary, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
